_meta.description: Persistent living knowledge for the Strategic Conflict & Escalation Monitor (SCEM). Carries forward conflict baselines (indicator medians build over 13 weeks), F-flag history, and roster status across weekly issues.

conflict_baselines.notes: All indicators at structural wartime norm. Spring offensive staging detected (I2 trajectory signal).

version_history.change: Initial baseline seeding from Week 1 scoring

indicatorBaselines.I2: FPV and Shahed operations are BASELINE — do not score above I2 Level 2 for routine drone exchange. Escalation signals: range extension, swarm doctrine, third-party cross-border incursion.

conflict_baselines.doctrine_note: Russia Nov 2024 nuclear doctrine: formally lowered threshold for nuclear use in response to conventional attacks supported by nuclear states. This is a PERSISTENT BASELINE SHIFT for I3 — not a weekly event. Subsequent Medvedev/MFA rhetoric is episodic (flag with episodic:true, do not increment I3).
conflict_baselines.recalc_note: Structural break override needed — Nov 2024 doctrine shift. Recalibrate I3 baseline from Nov 2024.

conflict_baselines.notes: Ceasefire holds at low friction. F4 flag on I5 — ceasefire claims unverified. Iran conflict side-effects (crossing closures) constitute I4 signal.

indicatorBaselines.I2: Drone use is baseline — escalation signal is swarm doctrine or cross-border incursion only.

conflict_baselines.notes: Lead signal this week. Four indicators above initial baseline. F2-adjacent flag. Quad mediation non-operational since Sep 2025. World's largest displacement crisis.

conflict_baselines.theatre: US-Israel vs Iran (Op Epic Fury / Roaring Lion)

f_flag_history.detail: Kremlin negotiating signals T3 only. No T2 corroboration.
Ceasefire/disarmament progress claims from Israeli/US officials (T3). Hamas disarmament unverified.
Doha/Washington/Angola ceasefire claims unverified operationally. MONUSCO oversight not functional.
Mutual drone attribution without forensic corroboration. Pattern consistent with false-flag seeding.
'Limited and targeted' Israeli framing inconsistent with operational scale (second division, Litani buffer zone, 700+ sorties).
CENTCOM claim of Iranian capabilities 'totally dismantled' contradicted by ongoing operations, Hormuz closure, Gulf attacks.
Iran conditional mediation signals (29 March) contradicted by FM denial of negotiations same day (31 March Al Jazeera).

flags.detail: SAF and RSF attributing drone strikes to each other without forensic corroboration in tight time windows. Pattern consistent with mutual false-flag seeding for domestic legitimation. Flag for FIMI assessment.

flags.detail: M23/Rwanda control of Rubaya coltan mine. FARDC operations targeting Rubaya explicitly. US-DRC strategic minerals partnership (Washington Accords) links conflict zone to critical supply chain.
flags.title: Resource conflict financing — coltan/cobalt
flags.summary: M23/Rwanda control of Rubaya coltan mine. FARDC operations targeting Rubaya explicitly. US-DRC strategic minerals partnership (Washington Accords) links conflict zone to critical supply chain.

flags.signal: I4 RED-band — Hormuz closure / largest oil disruption in recorded history
flags.detail: Strait of Hormuz: 6 vessels/day vs 135 normally. Brent crude >$120/barrel. QatarEnergy force majeure on all LNG exports. Iran demanding yuan not dollars — petrodollar challenge. IEA: largest supply disruption in history of global oil market.
flags.title: I4 RED-band — Hormuz closure / largest oil disruption in recorded history
flags.summary: Strait of Hormuz: 6 vessels/day vs 135 normally. Brent crude >$120/barrel. QatarEnergy force majeure on all LNG exports. Iran demanding yuan not dollars — petrodollar challenge. IEA: largest supply disruption in history of global oil market.

flags.signal: I3 RED-band — 400kg 60%-enriched uranium at unknown location post-strikes
flags.detail: CSIS analysis: Iran retains ~400kg 60%-enriched uranium whose location is unknown post-strikes. US proposal demands Iran commit to never obtaining nuclear weapon — confirming US does not consider nuclear risk resolved. EGHTM should assess implications for European deterrence posture.
flags.title: I3 RED-band — 400kg 60%-enriched uranium at unknown location post-strikes
flags.summary: CSIS analysis: Iran retains ~400kg 60%-enriched uranium whose location is unknown post-strikes. US proposal demands Iran commit to never obtaining nuclear weapon — confirming US does not consider nuclear risk resolved. EGHTM should assess implications for European deterrence posture.

flags.signal: I6 RED-band — 1M+ displaced (20% of Lebanon's population)
flags.detail: Largest displacement by velocity in Lebanon's modern history. GERP should assess compound drivers: conflict displacement intersecting with Lebanon's pre-existing economic collapse and climate-stressed agricultural sector.

reliability_flags.telegram_ukraine_russia: T4 maximum — velocity detection only. Fabricated PSYOP channels documented 2025.
reliability_flags.sudan_osint_x: T3 (not T4) — civil society networks have been primary early-warning ahead of T1. CGTN Sudan = likely F3.
reliability_flags.cgtn: State media disinformation pattern documented — treat as F4 (state media flag)

i5_calibration_2026.us_channel_note: US withdrawal from 66+ multilateral institutions means US participation in multilateral forums is no longer a reliable I5 positive indicator for 2026. Weight EU/Gulf/African Union mediation channels more heavily in Gaza, Ukraine, Sudan theatres.
